findings.description: `HttpResponse` is referenced in the section body (bullet points about `setContentType` and `setContentDisposition`) but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: 業務アクションの実装のポイント: 「レスポンスのコンテンツタイプは HttpResponse#setContentType を使用して設定する」「ダウンロードファイルのファイル名は HttpResponse#setContentDisposition を使用して設定する」

findings.description: `CsvDataBindConfig` appears in the DTO code block (`CsvDataBindConfig.QuoteMode.NORMAL`) but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: @CsvFormat(..., quoteMode = CsvDataBindConfig.QuoteMode.NORMAL, ...) in ProjectDownloadDto.java code block

findings.description: `ApplicationException` appears in the `@OnError` annotation in the action code block but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: @OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "/WEB-INF/view/project/index.jsp") in ProjectAction.java code block
